data.title: Add unit test for task-execution behavioral-testing-standard reference
data.description:
## Description
Add a unit test verifying task-execution.md references the shared behavioral testing standard.

### Steps
1. Add test to tests/skills/test_task_execution_template.py
2. Verify task-execution.md Step 4 contains reference to behavioral-testing-standard.md

### File Impact
- tests/skills/test_task_execution_template.py — Edit

## Testing Mode
RED

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] `bash tests/run-all.sh` passes (exit 0)
  Verify: bash tests/run-all.sh
- [ ] Test verifies behavioral-testing-standard reference
  Verify: python3 -m pytest tests/skills/test_task_execution_template.py -q
